task.summary: Default task
refactor(networking): extract wait_for_config and wait_for_start
refactor(logging): convert us to ms
chore: update readme.md
feat(zone-processor): allow multiple rsus to connect at the same time
feat(cli): reworked argument passing by using CLAP
feat(cli): add id cli support to RSU and ZP
refactor(logging): prevent ort from spamming, change source_device to device_id
refactor: changed address
refactor: split zone_processor into two files
feat(csv_writer): csv is streamed instead of written at end
feat(zone-processor): better error handling for RSU tasks
fix(zone-processor): better edge case handling
fix(zone-processor): better edge case handling
fix(zone-processor): better edge case handling
refactor: apply clippy suggestions
refactor: apply clippy suggestions
chore: update ip of roadside-unit
chore: update ip for experiment
fix: actually use the fps and duration in suite mode
fix: pass --release flag to preprocessor
refactor: reduce sleeps
refactor: bin optimizations
feat(test): add full suite
chore: change ip again, thanks magenta
feat: optimise queue system
fix: round robin check every 10ms anyway
fix: did not pass deviceid so overwriting did an oopsie
refactor: switch to tracing over log
refactor: improved logging
fix: several memory optimizations to hopefully fix the leak...
fix: revert update_pending_frame changes
fix: make sure connections are properly dropped
chore: make quick mode use 2 RSU
feat(connection): better overall connection handling + formatting
refactor: clippy suggestions
fix: add letterbox to full suite
feat: add full setup for each resolution
fix: logic error in config creation
feat: initial analysis
feat(logging): add timestamp to measure queueing times

refactor: refactor methods since too long
- change deviceId away from String

refactor: refactor methods since too long
- change deviceId away from String

refactor: refactor methods since too long
- change deviceId away from String
refactor: remove image_width, image_height. add encoding_spec to result
feat: atomic writes, rsu_handler shutdown
feat: add custom run mode
feat: up the experiment duration to 60s
fix: edge case of result writer failing experiment. remove timeout. wait for finalization
fix: more logging for bug...
